violations.text: Ceiling tiles in the kitchen are in poor repair, stained from previous water damage. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/17/2026
One light panel in the kitchen was nonfunctional during inspection. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/17/2026
One ceiling light panel in the kitchen has an accumulation of dead insects. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 02/17/2026
Ceiling tiles in the kitchen are stained from pervious water damage. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/01/2026

The ceiling light covers have an accumulation of soil residue and dead insects. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 02/01/2026

The pre-flush spray hose at the 3 bay sink is hanging below the flood rim. A plumbing system shall be installed to prevent backflow of a liquid or gas contaminant into the water supply by providing an air gap or installing an approved backflow prevention device. New Violation. Correct By: 09/01/2025

The center island countertop is in poor repair, with small holes plus a piece missing, exposing pressed fiberboard. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 09/01/2025

Soap and paper towel dispensers observed at the 3 bay sink. A sink used for FOOD preparation or UTENSIL washing, or a service sink or curbed cleaning facility used for the disposal of mop water or similar wastes, may not be provided with the handwashing aids and devices required for a HANDWASHING SINK. Custodian removed soap and paper towel dispensers during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/15/2024

PIC stated utensils are not sanitized after washing and rinsing them. After being cleaned, equipment and utensils must be sanitized in the 3-bay-sink or dishwasher. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/15/2024

The establishment is lacking a thermometer to test food temperatures. Food temperature measuring devices shall be provided and be readily accessible for checking cooking, cooling, reheating, and hot/cold holding temperatures of time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. New Violation. Correct By: 10/17/2024

Staff were observed not wearing hair restraints. Food employees must wear hair restraints such as hats, hair coverings, or nets that are worn to effectively keep their hair from contacting exposed food, clean equipment/utensils, linens, and unwrapped single-service and single-use articles. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/15/2024
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 10/17/2024

The pre-flush spray hose at the 3 bay sink is hanging below the flood rim. A plumbing system shall be installed to prevent backflow of a liquid or gas contaminant into the water supply by providing an air gap or installing an approved backflow prevention device. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/15/2024

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 02/23/2024

The drain plug for the outside dumpster is missing. Drains in receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must have drain plugs in place. New Violation. Correct By: 02/06/2024
